```{r setup, include=FALSE}
## knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
## workflowr::wflow_build(files = here("./analysis/standard_serology_igg_ap_matpm_prevacvacc_j.Rmd"))
## code below generates files which match standard_serology_igg_v2.wp_matpm.rmd for vaccinated and boosted visits
## code below written to test revised code for t.test() from R update 

library(here)
library(workflowr)
library(rmarkdown)
library(tidyverse)
library(extrafont)
library(fpc)
library(DBI)
library(DT)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggpubr)
library(stringr)
library(ggfortify)

library(missMDA)
library(FactoMineR)
library(NbClust)
library(clValid)
library(kohonen)

library(mclust)
library(cluster)
library(papeR)
library(rmarkdown)
library(kableExtra)
library(skimr)
library(pheatmap)

library(dendextend)
library(janitor)
library(qgraph)
library(boot)
library(polycor)
library(rcompanion)
library(pvclust)

library(GGally)   
library(mvtnorm)
library(ggplot2)
library(olsrr)
library(drc)
library(cgam)
library(gratia)
library(glmtoolbox)
library(emmeans)
library(stats) 
library(MASS)
library(rstatix)
library(hrbrthemes)

#### set options
options(useFancyQuotes = FALSE)

```

```{r c0-std-fragment, results="asis", warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
## Reads the current std_config row from the parent environment as `cfg_row`.
v <- VOCAB[[cfg_row$vocab]]
tp <- c(cfg_row$t0, cfg_row$t1, cfg_row$t2)

res_path <- c0_out(sprintf("igg_standard_residuals_%s_matpm_prevacvacc_%s.RData",
                           tolower(cfg_row$arm), cfg_row$suffix))
fit_path <- c0_out(sprintf("igg_standard_model_fit_%s_matpm_prevacvacc_%s.RData",
                           tolower(cfg_row$arm), cfg_row$suffix))

cat(sprintf("\n### %s arm - %s window (%s)\n\n",
            cfg_row$arm, cfg_row$window, paste(tp, collapse = "/")))

standardise_arm_visit(
  selected_infant_arm = cfg_row$arm,
  timeperiods         = tp,
  antigenlist         = v$antigenlist,
  igglist             = v$igglist,
  fulligglist         = v$fulligglist,
  wholeassay_map      = wholeassay_map,
  residual_path       = res_path,
  modelfit_path       = fit_path,
  render              = run_standardisation   # FALSE for now -> no plots, no refit
)
```

```{r fit_feature, include=FALSE}
## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
## .fit_feature()  --  full six-model ladder + paired-t model selection
##
## Fits, for a single antigen x feature data frame `df` (containing columns
## log_assay_value, log_total_IgG_MFI, arm_name, subject_accession, visit_name,
## feature), the six standardisation models used throughout the GaPs pipeline:
##
##   1  linear: unweighted        lm
##   2  linear: discrete          lm, discrete (0/1) influence weights
##   3  linear: continuous        lm, continuous WLS (Huber) weights
##   4  gam:    unweighted        cgam smooth-increasing
##   5  gam:    discrete          cgam, discrete weights
##   6  gam:    continuous        cgam, continuous weights
##   (0  mean-only reference / 7  "no significant trend")
##
## then chooses the best model by the paired-t residual-shrinkage algorithm.
##
## Returns list(resid = <weighted residual long table for this feature>,
##              stats = <per-model fit statistics incl. chosen selmodel>).
## Numeric behaviour is byte-for-byte with the original per-arm Rmd files.
## `feat` is the feature name (character), used as the `feature` key `i`.
## `visit` is fixed to "all_visits" as in the source files.
## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
.fit_feature <- function(df, feat, visit = "all_visits") {

  i <- feat

  data_m1 <- df[, c("subject_accession", "visit_name", "feature", "arm_name",
                    "log_assay_value", "log_total_IgG_MFI")]
  data_m1 <- na.omit(data_m1)
  data_m1 <- data_m1[order(data_m1$log_total_IgG_MFI), ]

  ## Guard: need enough points to fit; otherwise return an empty contribution.
  if (nrow(data_m1) < 5 || length(unique(data_m1$log_total_IgG_MFI)) < 3) {
    return(list(resid = data.frame(), stats = data.frame()))
  }

  data_lmstatsx_total <- data.frame()

  ## --- weight scaffolding (from the simple lm + gam pilot fits) ------------
  lm_simp <- lm(log_assay_value ~ log_total_IgG_MFI, na.action = na.omit,
                data = data_m1)
  data_m1$w_func <- abs(1 / lm(abs(lm_simp$residuals) ~ lm_simp$fitted.values)$fitted.values)
  data_m1$w_disc <- as.numeric(abs(rstudent(lm_simp)) < 3 &
                               abs(cooks.distance(lm_simp)) < 4 / nrow(lm_simp$model))
  data_m1$w_disc <- ifelse(data_m1$w_disc == 0, data_m1$w_disc + 0.001, data_m1$w_disc)
  zero_weights <- nrow(as.data.frame(data_m1[data_m1$w_disc < 1, ]))

  gam_fit <- cgam::cgam(log_assay_value ~ cgam::s.incr(log_total_IgG_MFI, numknots = 2,
                        knots = 0, var.knots = 0, space = "Q", db.exp = TRUE),
                        data = data_m1, cic = FALSE, nsim = 100)
  gam_fitted.value <- as.numeric(gam_fit$muhat)
  gam_residuals    <- as.numeric(gam_fit$y) - as.numeric(gam_fit$muhat)
  data_m1$wg_func  <- abs(1 / lm(abs(gam_residuals) ~ gam_fitted.value)$fitted.values)

  modx <- log_assay_value ~ log_total_IgG_MFI

  ## --- model 1: linear unweighted -----------------------------------------
  mod_fit <- lm(modx, na.action = na.omit, data = data_m1)
  data_m1$fitted.value_mod1 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$fitted.values)
  data_m1$resid_mod1 <- mod_fit$residuals
  data_m1$resid <- mod_fit$residuals
  data_m1$fitted <- as.numeric(mod_fit$fitted.values)
  data_m1$w_func <- MASS::psi.huber(data_m1$resid)
  data_m1$w <- 1
  data_m1$wclas <- data_m1$w_disc
  smod_fit <- summary(mod_fit)
  ds <- data.frame(model = "linear: unweighted", modeln = 1, feature = i, visit = visit,
                   intercept_value = smod_fit$coefficients[1, 1],
                   slope_value = smod_fit$coefficients[2, 1],
                   pbeta = smod_fit$coefficients[2, 4],
                   nobs = nrow(data_m1), ncoefficients = 2,
                   r.squared = smod_fit$r.squared, adj.r.squared = smod_fit$adj.r.squared)
  ds$r2inlier <- .adj_r2(ds$nobs, ds$ncoefficients, .rsquare_inlier(data_m1))
  ds$selmodel <- 0
  data_lmstatsx_total <- rbind(data_lmstatsx_total, ds)

  ## --- model 2: linear discrete weights ------------------------------------
  data_m1$w <- data_m1$w_disc; data_m1$wclas <- data_m1$w_disc
  mod_fit <- lm(modx, weights = as.numeric(data_m1$w), na.action = na.omit, data = data_m1)
  data_m1$fitted.value_mod2 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$fitted.values)
  data_m1$resid_mod2 <- mod_fit$residuals
  data_m1$resid <- mod_fit$residuals; data_m1$fitted <- as.numeric(mod_fit$fitted.values)
  smod_fit <- summary(mod_fit)
  ds <- data.frame(model = "linear: discrete", modeln = 2, feature = i, visit = visit,
                   intercept_value = smod_fit$coefficients[1, 1],
                   slope_value = smod_fit$coefficients[2, 1],
                   pbeta = smod_fit$coefficients[2, 4],
                   nobs = nrow(data_m1), ncoefficients = 2,
                   r.squared = smod_fit$r.squared, adj.r.squared = smod_fit$adj.r.squared)
  ds$r2inlier <- .adj_r2(ds$nobs, ds$ncoefficients, .rsquare_inlier(data_m1))
  ds$selmodel <- 0
  data_lmstatsx_total <- rbind(data_lmstatsx_total, ds)

  ## --- model 3: linear continuous (WLS) weights ----------------------------
  data_m1$w <- data_m1$w_func; data_m1$wclas <- data_m1$w_disc
  mod_fit <- lm(modx, weights = as.numeric(data_m1$w), na.action = na.omit, data = data_m1)
  data_m1$fitted.value_mod3 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$fitted.values)
  data_m1$resid_mod3 <- mod_fit$residuals
  data_m1$resid <- mod_fit$residuals; data_m1$fitted <- as.numeric(mod_fit$fitted.values)
  smod_fit <- summary(mod_fit)
  ds <- data.frame(model = "linear: continuous", modeln = 3, feature = i, visit = visit,
                   intercept_value = smod_fit$coefficients[1, 1],
                   slope_value = smod_fit$coefficients[2, 1],
                   pbeta = smod_fit$coefficients[2, 4],
                   nobs = nrow(data_m1), ncoefficients = 2,
                   r.squared = smod_fit$r.squared, adj.r.squared = smod_fit$adj.r.squared)
  ds$r2inlier <- .adj_r2(ds$nobs, ds$ncoefficients, .rsquare_inlier(data_m1))
  ds$selmodel <- 0
  data_lmstatsx_total <- rbind(data_lmstatsx_total, ds)

  ## --- model 4: cgam unweighted --------------------------------------------
  data_m1$w <- 1
  mod_fit <- cgam::cgam(log_assay_value ~ cgam::s.incr(log_total_IgG_MFI, numknots = 3,
                        knots = 0, var.knots = 0, space = "Q", db.exp = TRUE),
                        data = data_m1, cic = FALSE, nsim = 100)
  data_m1$fitted.value_mod4 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
  data_m1$resid_mod4 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$y) - as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
  data_m1$resid <- as.numeric(mod_fit$y) - as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
  data_m1$fitted <- as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
  data_m1$wg_func <- MASS::psi.huber(data_m1$resid)
  data_m1$wg_disc <- data_m1$w_disc
  if (nrow(data_m1[data_m1$w_disc < 1 & data_m1$w_func < (data_m1$wg_func * 1.0), ]) > 0) {
    data_m1[data_m1$w_disc < 1 & data_m1$w_func < (data_m1$wg_func * 1.0), ]$wg_disc <- 1.00
  }
  zerog_weights <- nrow(as.data.frame(data_m1[data_m1$wg_disc < 1, ]))
  ds <- data.frame(model = "gam: unweighted", modeln = 4, feature = i, visit = visit,
                   intercept_value = 0, slope_value = mod_fit$zcoefs,
                   pbeta = mod_fit$pvals.beta, nobs = nrow(data_m1), ncoefficients = 4,
                   r.squared = .r2(data_m1))
  ds$adj.r.squared <- .adj_r2(ds$nobs, ds$ncoefficients, ds$r.squared)
  ds$r2inlier <- .adj_r2(ds$nobs, ds$ncoefficients, .rsquare_inlier(data_m1))
  ds$selmodel <- 0
  data_lmstatsx_total <- rbind(data_lmstatsx_total, ds)

  ## --- model 5: cgam discrete weights --------------------------------------
  data_m1$w <- data_m1$wg_disc; data_m1$wclas <- data_m1$wg_disc
  mod_fit <- cgam::cgam(log_assay_value ~ cgam::s.incr(log_total_IgG_MFI, numknots = 3,
                        knots = 0, var.knots = 0, space = "Q", db.exp = TRUE),
                        data = data_m1, weights = data_m1$w, cic = FALSE, nsim = 100)
  data_m1$fitted.value_mod5 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
  data_m1$resid_mod5 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$y) - as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
  data_m1$resid <- as.numeric(mod_fit$y) - as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
  data_m1$fitted <- as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
  ds <- data.frame(model = "gam: discrete", modeln = 5, feature = i, visit = visit,
                   intercept_value = 0, slope_value = mod_fit$zcoefs,
                   pbeta = mod_fit$pvals.beta, nobs = nrow(data_m1), ncoefficients = 4,
                   r.squared = .r2(data_m1))
  ds$adj.r.squared <- .adj_r2(ds$nobs, ds$ncoefficients, ds$r.squared)
  ds$r2inlier <- .adj_r2(ds$nobs, ds$ncoefficients, .rsquare_inlier(data_m1))
  ds$selmodel <- 0
  data_lmstatsx_total <- rbind(data_lmstatsx_total, ds)

  ## --- model 6: cgam continuous weights ------------------------------------
  data_m1$w <- data_m1$wg_func
  mod_fit <- cgam::cgam(log_assay_value ~ cgam::s.incr(log_total_IgG_MFI, numknots = 3,
                        knots = 0, var.knots = 0, space = "Q", db.exp = TRUE),
                        data = data_m1, weights = data_m1$w, cic = FALSE, nsim = 100)
  data_m1$fitted.value_mod6 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
  data_m1$resid_mod6 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$y) - as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
  data_m1$resid <- as.numeric(mod_fit$y) - as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
  data_m1$fitted <- as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
  ds <- data.frame(model = "gam: continuous", modeln = 6, feature = i, visit = visit,
                   intercept_value = 0, slope_value = mod_fit$zcoefs,
                   pbeta = mod_fit$pvals.beta, nobs = nrow(data_m1), ncoefficients = 4,
                   r.squared = .r2(data_m1))
  ds$adj.r.squared <- .adj_r2(ds$nobs, ds$ncoefficients, ds$r.squared)
  ds$r2inlier <- .adj_r2(ds$nobs, ds$ncoefficients, .rsquare_inlier(data_m1))
  ds$selmodel <- 0
  data_lmstatsx_total <- rbind(data_lmstatsx_total, ds)

  ## --- mean-only reference (model 0) ---------------------------------------
  data_m1 <- as.data.frame(data_m1)
  data_m1$mean_observed <- ifelse(data_m1$log_assay_value > 0,
                                  mean(data_m1$log_assay_value), 0)
  data_m1$resid_mod0 <- data_m1$log_assay_value - data_m1$mean_observed
  data_m1$fitted.value_mod0 <- data_m1$log_total_IgG_MFI

  ## --- assemble weighted residual long table -------------------------------
  data_tresid <- as.data.frame(tidyr::pivot_longer(
    data = data_m1[, c("subject_accession","visit_name","feature",
                       "resid_mod0","resid_mod1","resid_mod2","resid_mod3",
                       "resid_mod4","resid_mod5","resid_mod6")],
    cols = c("resid_mod0","resid_mod1","resid_mod2","resid_mod3",
             "resid_mod4","resid_mod5","resid_mod6"),
    names_to = "models", values_to = "resid"))
  data_tresid$modeln <- 0
  data_tresid$modeln[data_tresid$models == "resid_mod0"] <- 7
  data_tresid$modeln[data_tresid$models == "resid_mod1"] <- 1
  data_tresid$modeln[data_tresid$models == "resid_mod2"] <- 2
  data_tresid$modeln[data_tresid$models == "resid_mod3"] <- 3
  data_tresid$modeln[data_tresid$models == "resid_mod4"] <- 4
  data_tresid$modeln[data_tresid$models == "resid_mod5"] <- 5
  data_tresid$modeln[data_tresid$models == "resid_mod6"] <- 6

  data_tweight <- tidyr::pivot_longer(
    data = data_m1[, c("subject_accession","feature","visit_name",
                       "w_func","w_disc","wg_func","wg_disc")],
    cols = c("w_func","w_disc","wg_func","wg_disc"),
    names_to = "models", values_to = "weight")
  data_tweight$modeln <- NA
  data_tweight$modeln[data_tweight$models == "w_disc"]  <- 2
  data_tweight$modeln[data_tweight$models == "w_func"]  <- 3
  data_tweight$modeln[data_tweight$models == "wg_disc"] <- 5
  data_tweight$modeln[data_tweight$models == "wg_func"] <- 6
  data_tweight <- data_tweight[, c("subject_accession","feature","visit_name",
                                   "modeln","weight")]

  data_tresidw <- merge(data_tresid, data_tweight,
                        by = c("subject_accession","feature","visit_name","modeln"),
                        all.x = TRUE)
  data_tresidw$weight[is.na(data_tresidw$weight)] <- 1
  data_tresidw$residw <- data_tresidw$resid * data_tresidw$weight
  data_tresidw$modeln <- factor(data_tresidw$modeln)
  data_tresidw$absresidw <- abs(data_tresidw$residw)

  ## --- paired-t residual-shrinkage tests -----------------------------------
  data_tresidw2 <- reshape(data_tresidw[, c("subject_accession","modeln","absresidw")],
                           direction = "wide", idvar = "subject_accession",
                           timevar = "modeln")
  pt <- function(a, b) {
    cols <- c(paste0("absresidw.", a), paste0("absresidw.", b))
    if (!all(cols %in% names(data_tresidw2))) return(list(p.value = NA, estimate = NA))
    tryCatch(t.test(Pair(data_tresidw2[[cols[1]]], data_tresidw2[[cols[2]]]) ~ 1,
                    data = data_tresidw2, alternative = "greater"),
             error = function(e) list(p.value = NA, estimate = NA))
  }
  pairedt12 <- pt(1, 2); pairedt13 <- pt(1, 3); pairedt14 <- pt(1, 4)
  pairedt45 <- pt(4, 5); pairedt46 <- pt(4, 6)

  ar <- function(m) data_lmstatsx_total$adj.r.squared[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln == m]
  pb <- function(m) data_lmstatsx_total$pbeta[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln == m]

  ## --- model-selection algorithm (verbatim decision tree) ------------------
  if (min(data_lmstatsx_total$pbeta[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln %in% 1:3]) > 0.05) {
    selmodel <- 7
  } else if (max(data_lmstatsx_total$adj.r.squared[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln %in% 1:6]) < 0.05) {
    selmodel <- 7
  } else if (max(data_lmstatsx_total$adj.r.squared[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln %in% 1:6]) < 0.15) {
    selmodel <- if (min(pb(1)) < 0.01) 1 else 7
  } else if (!is.na(pairedt14$p.value) && pairedt14$p.value < 0.05 && pairedt14$estimate > 0) {
    selmodel <- 4
    if (!is.na(pairedt45$p.value) && !is.na(pairedt46$p.value) &&
        pairedt45$p.value < 0.05 && pairedt46$p.value < 0.05 && ar(6) > ar(5)) {
      selmodel <- 6
    } else if (!is.na(pairedt45$p.value) && pairedt45$p.value < 0.05 && pairedt45$estimate > 0) {
      selmodel <- 5
    } else if (!is.na(pairedt46$p.value) && pairedt46$p.value < 0.05 && pairedt46$estimate > 0) {
      selmodel <- 6
    }
  } else {
    selmodel <- 1
    if (!is.na(pairedt12$p.value) && !is.na(pairedt13$p.value) &&
        pairedt12$p.value < 0.05 && pairedt13$p.value < 0.05 && ar(3) > ar(2)) {
      selmodel <- 3
    } else if (!is.na(pairedt12$p.value) && pairedt12$p.value < 0.05 && pairedt12$estimate > 0) {
      selmodel <- 2
    } else if (!is.na(pairedt13$p.value) && pairedt13$p.value < 0.05 && pairedt13$estimate > 0) {
      selmodel <- 3
    }
  }

  data_lmstatsx_total$selmodel <- ifelse(selmodel > 0, selmodel, NA)
  data_tresidw$selmodel <- ifelse(selmodel > 0, selmodel, NA)

  ## was:  list(resid = data_tresidw, stats = data_lmstatsx_total)
  list(resid    = data_tresidw,
       stats    = data_lmstatsx_total,
       data_m1  = data_m1,      # carries fitted.value_mod*, resid_mod*, weights
       selmodel = selmodel)     # chosen model 1-6 (or 7 = no trend)
}
```

```{r render_feature, include=FALSE}

## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
## .render_feature()  --  diagnostic figures for one antigen x feature fit
##
## Reproduces the original per-arm Rmd output:
##   * mp0            : bivariate scatter (arm-coloured) with all six fitted
##                      regression lines + mean-observed line
##   * m[[1..6]]      : residual-vs-fitted panels (Loess overlay) per model
##   * h[[1..6]]      : residual density panels (Normal overlay) per model
##   * multi_plot     : mp0 + best-model residual + best-model density (triptych)
##   * residual_plots : full 6-model residual/density grid
##
## Consumes the `data_m1` and `selmodel` returned by .fit_feature().
## Prints the figures via knitr::knit_print() with the same {.tabset} headings.
## Display-only; no data is written. Requires ggplot2, ggpubr.
## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
.render_feature <- function(data_m1, selmodel, feat, visit = "all_visits",
                            arm_colors = color.values,
                            arm_labels = color.labels) {

  i <- feat
  if (is.null(data_m1) || nrow(data_m1) == 0 || selmodel == 7) {
    cat(sprintf("\n*%s: no significant trend / insufficient data.*\n\n", feat))
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  ## --- axis labels + best-model annotation --------------------------------
  ylabel <- expression("log"["2"] ~ "(Feature)")
  xlabel <- expression("log"["2"] ~ "(Total IgG +1)")
  title_str1 <- paste0(i, ", Visit: ", visit)

  ## Chosen-model stroke weighting (bubble boldness ~ influence weight)
  if (selmodel %in% c(1, 4)) {
    data_m1$w_stroke <- 1
  } else if (selmodel == 2) {
    data_m1$w_stroke <- ifelse(data_m1$w_disc < 1, 0.2, 1)
  } else if (selmodel == 3) {
    data_m1$w_stroke <- data_m1$w_func
  } else if (selmodel == 5) {
    data_m1$w_stroke <- ifelse(data_m1$wg_disc < 1, 0.2, 1)
  } else {
    data_m1$w_stroke <- data_m1$wg_func
  }
  nr2 <- paste0("Selected model: ", selmodel)

  ## --- mp0: bivariate scatter with all six fitted lines -------------------
  mp0 <- ggplot(data = data_m1,
                aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = log_assay_value, color = arm_name)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = arm_name, stroke = w_stroke), show.legend = TRUE, shape = 21) +
    geom_line(aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = fitted.value_mod1), color = "black",     size = 0.5) +
    geom_line(aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = fitted.value_mod2), color = "red",       size = 0.5) +
    geom_line(aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = fitted.value_mod3), color = "blue",      size = 0.5) +
    geom_line(aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = fitted.value_mod4), color = "green",     size = 0.5) +
    geom_line(aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = fitted.value_mod5), color = "purple",    size = 0.5) +
    geom_line(aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = fitted.value_mod6), color = "darkgreen", size = 0.5) +
    geom_line(aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = mean_observed),     color = "#E9A3C9",   size = 0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Study arm", values = arm_colors, labels = arm_labels) +
    labs(x = xlabel, y = ylabel, title = title_str1, subtitle = nr2,
         caption = "Symbol weights are proportional to their boldness - weighted according to best fit model.") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
          plot.caption.position = "plot",
          legend.position = c(1, 0), legend.direction = "vertical",
          legend.justification = c(1, 0),
          legend.background = element_rect(linetype = "solid", colour = "black"))

  ## --- per-model residual (m) + density (h) panels ------------------------
  rplot.color <- c('linear: unweighted' = "black", 'linear: discrete' = "red",
                   'linear: continuous' = "blue",  'gam: unweighted'  = "green",
                   'gam: discrete'      = "purple",'gam: continuous'  = "darkgreen")
  rplot_list <- c("linear: unweighted","linear: discrete","linear: continuous",
                  "gam: unweighted","gam: discrete","gam: continuous")

  data_m1$j_stroke1 <- 1
  data_m1$j_stroke2 <- data_m1$w_disc
  data_m1$j_stroke3 <- data_m1$w_func
  data_m1$j_stroke4 <- 1
  data_m1$j_stroke5 <- data_m1$wg_disc
  data_m1$j_stroke6 <- data_m1$wg_func

  fitted.values <- paste0("fitted.value_mod", 1:6)
  resid.cols    <- paste0("resid_mod", 1:6)
  j_stroke.cols <- paste0("j_stroke", 1:6)

  m <- vector("list", 6); h <- vector("list", 6)
  for (j in 1:6) {
    data_m1$fity   <- data_m1[[fitted.values[j]]]
    data_m1$residy <- data_m1[[resid.cols[j]]]
    data_m1$stroky <- data_m1[[j_stroke.cols[j]]]
    max_resid <- max(data_m1$residy, na.rm = TRUE)
    min_resid <- min(data_m1$residy, na.rm = TRUE)

    m[[j]] <- ggplot(data = data_m1, aes(x = fity, y = residy, color = arm_name)) +
      geom_point(aes(color = arm_name, stroke = stroky), shape = 21, show.legend = FALSE) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = rplot.color[j]) +
      geom_smooth(color = "orange", method = "loess", se = TRUE, size = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
      labs(y = "Residual", x = "Fitted Value", title = rplot_list[j], caption = "Loess fit  ") +
      scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min_resid, max_resid)) +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 10),
            plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "lines"),
            plot.caption = element_text(color = "orange"))

    h[[j]] <- ggplot(data = data_m1, aes(x = residy)) +
      geom_density(aes(color = arm_name, fill = arm_name), alpha = 0.2, show.legend = FALSE) +
      stat_function(fun = dnorm, n = 101, size = 0.8,
                    args = list(mean = mean(data_m1$residy), sd = sd(data_m1$residy)),
                    color = rplot.color[j], show.legend = FALSE, na.rm = TRUE) +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(title = "", subtitle = "", y = "Density", x = "", caption = "Normal dist. fit") +
      scale_x_continuous(limits = c(min_resid, max_resid)) +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(plot.title = element_blank(), legend.title = element_blank(),
            plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "lines"),
            plot.caption = element_text(color = rplot.color[selmodel]))
  }

  ## --- best-model triptych (mp0 + chosen residual + chosen density) -------
  multi_plot <- ggpubr::ggarrange(mp0, m[[selmodel]], h[[selmodel]],
                                  align = "v", ncol = 3, nrow = 1,
                                  widths = c(3, 2, 1), common.legend = FALSE)

  ## --- full 6-model residual/density grid (order matches source: 1,4,2,5,3,6)
  strip <- function(p) p + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), plot.caption = element_blank())
  pair  <- function(j) ggpubr::ggarrange(strip(m[[j]]), strip(h[[j]]),
                                         ncol = 2, nrow = 1, align = "v",
                                         legend = "none", widths = c(2, 1))
  residual_plots <- ggpubr::ggarrange(
    pair(1), pair(4), pair(2), pair(5), pair(3), pair(6),
    ncol = 2, nrow = 3, legend = "none")

  knitr::knit_print(multi_plot);     cat("\n \n")
  knitr::knit_print(residual_plots); cat("\n \n")
  invisible(NULL)
}
```
